name: low_image_resolution
description: Average image dimensions below 500×400. RE + Cars.
sellerMessage: Your listing images are below our minimum resolution of 500×400 pixels. Please upload higher-resolution photos and resubmit.

name: low_lqi
description: Listing Quality Index below 0.30 (excluding land/plots). Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing does not meet JamesEdition's quality standards. Please improve your photos, add a detailed description, and ensure all property information is complete.

name: few_pictures
description: Listing has fewer than 2 images. Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing needs at least 2 images. Please add more photos and resubmit.

name: price_too_low_re
description: RE sale listing below $490K in EU countries. Excludes rentals. Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing price is below the minimum threshold for JamesEdition in this market. Please verify your price or contact support if you believe this is an error.

name: too_low_price_430k
description: RE sale under $430K in ES/FR/GR/IT/PT. Excludes rentals. AI-verified — auto-decides if ≥90% confident.
sellerMessage: Your listing price appears low for JamesEdition's luxury marketplace. Please verify your pricing.

name: five_hundred_million_ads
description: Any listing priced $500M+ (excluding private islands). Sent to manual moderation queue.
sellerMessage: Listings priced over $500M require manual verification. Our team will review your listing shortly.

name: high_price_low_lqi
displayName: High Price >$50M + Low LQI or Few Images
description: Listings over $50M with LQI<45 or ≤4 images. AI-verified — auto-rejects if ≥90% confident.
sellerMessage: Your listing is priced above $50M but has limited photos or a low quality score. Please add more high-quality images and improve your listing details.

name: incorrectly_priced
description: Price over $100M (non-zero) but only ≤5 bedrooms (not castle/chateau/farm_ranch/land, not US). Likely pricing error.
sellerMessage: The price is incorrect. Please contact JamesEdition support at support@jamesedition.com

name: rational_check_price
description: Price over $100M with ≤5 bathrooms (not castle/chateau/island, not US). Sent to manual moderation.
sellerMessage: The price appears to be unrealistically high and does not reflect a genuine listing. Please review before resubmitting.

name: dubai_price_sqm
description: AE sale listings with price/sqm ≤$1000. Suspiciously low for Dubai. Excludes rentals.
sellerMessage: The price per square meter for your Dubai listing appears unusually low. Please verify your listing price and living area, then resubmit.

name: extremely_low_price_sqm
description: Price per sqm ≤$150 for apartments/villas/houses (not US/AE, not rentals).
sellerMessage: The price per square meter is unusually low for this property type and market. Please verify your listing price and living area.

name: rational_bedrooms_bathrooms
description: 30+ bedrooms or bathrooms (not castle/chateau, price ≤$3M). Likely scraping error.
sellerMessage: The number of bedrooms/bathrooms appears unrealistically high and does not reflect a genuine listing. Please review before resubmitting.

name: scraping_bedrooms_too_big
description: 20+ beds/baths from CGG/Yooko groups (2837, 2771). Scraping error.
sellerMessage: Your listing shows 20+ bedrooms or bathrooms, which appears to be a data error. Please correct the property details and resubmit.

name: living_area_too_large
description: Living area over 10,000 sqm (not castle/land, price ≤$10M, not US/AE). AI-verified.
sellerMessage: Your listing shows a living area over 10,000 sqm, which may be incorrect. Our team will verify this.

name: living_area_too_small
description: Living area under 10 sqm (not castle/land, not US/AE). AI-verified.
sellerMessage: Your listing shows a living area under 10 sqm, which may be a data error. Our team will verify this.

name: land_equals_living
description: Land area equals living area (data quality flag). Both must be present and > 0. AI-verified.
sellerMessage: The land area and living area of your property appear to be identical. Please verify these measurements.

name: living_area_exceeds_max
displayName: Living Area Exceeds Max for Type
description: Living area unreasonably large for the property type.
sellerMessage: The living area exceeds the expected maximum for this property type. Please verify your listing details and resubmit.

name: por_price_zero
description: Price on request with $0 price, small living area ≤60sqm, ≤2 beds. Suspicious.
sellerMessage: Price on Request listings must include complete property details. Your listing has no price and limited information, which does not meet our listing requirements.

name: por_france
description: Price on Request is not allowed for French real estate listings (legal requirement).
sellerMessage: Price on Request listings are not permitted in France due to legal requirements. Please add a price to your listing.

name: por_low_price
description: Price on Request with listed sale price under $450K in key EU countries. Excludes rentals.
sellerMessage: Price on Request is not available for listings priced under $450,000 in this market. Please set a visible price or contact support.

name: russia_block
description: Block all listings with country code RU.
sellerMessage: Listings located in Russia are not currently accepted on JamesEdition.

name: moderation_by_request
description: Flagged by Viktor for manual review.
sellerMessage: Your listing has been flagged for manual review. Our team will review it shortly.

name: short_description
description: Description is too short (under 50 characters). AI-verified.
sellerMessage: Your listing description is very short. Please add more detail to help buyers understand your property.

name: title_equals_other
description: Title is literally 'Other' with type 'other'. Likely placeholder.
sellerMessage: Your listing title is a placeholder. Please update it with a descriptive title that reflects the property.

name: commercial_properties_title
description: Title contains commercial keywords from RE_Commercial_properties_2023 list. Type is land/other.
sellerMessage: JamesEdition is a luxury residential marketplace. Commercial properties such as offices, warehouses, and industrial spaces are not accepted.

name: commercial_properties_23
description: Updated commercial keyword list in title, not residential type. Uses RE_Commercial_properties_2023.
sellerMessage: JamesEdition is a luxury residential marketplace. Commercial properties are not accepted on our platform.

name: commercial_body_other
description: Body text contains commercial keywords + complex_of_apt, type is Other/castle, no residential keywords.
sellerMessage: Your listing description suggests this may be a commercial property. JamesEdition only accepts luxury residential listings. If this is residential, please update your description to clarify.

name: sold_keywords
description: Title contains sold keywords from Sold_Properties list. Excludes Sold_furnished false positives.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to be sold or under offer. Please remove sold properties from your feed to keep your listings current.

name: bad_condition_keywords
description: Title matches RE_bad_condition23 list. Not for castles/land. Excludes RE_fancy_types. Price <$1.5M. AI-verified.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to describe a property requiring significant renovation. JamesEdition showcases luxury properties in good to excellent condition.

name: ai_images_description
description: Description mentions AI-generated images. Uses AI_images list.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to use AI-generated images. JamesEdition requires actual photos of the property.

name: not_real_images_description
description: Description indicates images don't represent the actual property. Uses not_real_images list.
sellerMessage: Your listing indicates the images may not represent the actual property. Please upload photos of the real property.

name: new_developments
description: Listing matches new development keywords from RE_New_Developments list.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to be a new development or off-plan project. These listings require additional review.

name: duplicates_within_single_account_us
description: Duplicate listings for the same property within a single US account. Excludes new developments, land/other types, and exception lists.
sellerMessage: Duplicate listings for the same property within a single account are not allowed.

name: duplicates_within_single_account_spain
description: Duplicate listings for the same property within a single Spanish account. Excludes new developments, land/other types, office 118806, and exception lists.
sellerMessage: Duplicate listings for the same property within a single account are not allowed.

name: duplicates_within_single_account_portugal
description: Duplicate listings for the same property within a single Portuguese account. Excludes new developments, land/other types, office 145919, and exception lists.
sellerMessage: Duplicate listings for the same property within a single account are not allowed.

name: cars_low_price
description: Car listings under $5,000. Too low for luxury marketplace.
sellerMessage: Car listings under $5,000 are below JamesEdition's minimum threshold for the luxury automotive marketplace.

name: cars_no_year
description: Car under $35K, no year, not a luxury brand. Uses luxuryCars list for exclusion.
sellerMessage: Your car listing is missing the model year and is priced below our threshold. Please add the model year and verify your price.

name: cars_freemium_low_price
description: Freemium car listing under $80K, year ≥1980, not luxury brand. Uses luxuryCars list for exclusion.
sellerMessage: Your car listing does not meet JamesEdition's price threshold for this vehicle category. Our marketplace features luxury and premium vehicles.

name: cars_truck_models
description: Freemium car listings for trucks/commercial vehicles under $130K.
sellerMessage: Trucks and commercial vehicles are not accepted on JamesEdition. Our marketplace focuses on luxury passenger vehicles.

name: cars_non_luxury_brand
description: Car title checked against luxuryCars list. Non-matching brands flagged for lower-priced listings.
sellerMessage: Your vehicle may not meet JamesEdition's luxury brand criteria for this price range.

name: netty_rentals
description: Group 890 (Netty): Reject all rental listings.
sellerMessage: Rental listings are not accepted from this feed on JamesEdition.

name: cgg_2_images
description: Groups 2771/2837 (CGG/Yooko): Under 3 images. Reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing needs at least 3 images. Please add more photos and resubmit.

name: nymls_images
description: Group 3167 (NYStateMLS): 3 or fewer images. Reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing needs more than 3 images to meet our requirements. Please add additional photos.

name: nystatemls_lqi
description: Group 3167 (NYStateMLS): LQI ≤45%. Reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing does not meet the quality standards required for this MLS feed on JamesEdition.

name: outdated_freemium_under_2m
description: Freemium account, outdated listing, price <$2M, created 2023 or earlier. ⚠️ HARDCODED DATES.
sellerMessage: This listing appears to be outdated. Please update your listing information or remove stale listings from your feed.

name: outdated_freemium_2m_5m
description: Freemium, outdated, $2-5M, created 2022 or earlier. ⚠️ HARDCODED DATES.
sellerMessage: This listing appears to be outdated. Please update your listing details or remove it from your feed.

name: outdated_paid_approve
description: Paid accounts with outdated listings — auto-approve (except office 102696).

name: gpt_condition_auto_italy
description: IT listings with AI condition score ≤2.4 and conclusion ≤2.4. Price <$2M. Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: This listing does not meet the visual quality standards for the Italian market on JamesEdition.

name: gpt_condition_auto_portugal
description: PT listings with AI condition ≤2.0 and conclusion ≤2.5. Price <$1.5M.
sellerMessage: This listing does not meet the visual quality standards for the Portuguese market on JamesEdition.

name: gpt_condition_auto_spain
description: ES listings with AI condition ≤2.0 and conclusion ≤2.0. Price ≤$2.5M.
sellerMessage: This listing does not meet the visual quality standards for the Spanish market on JamesEdition.

name: gpt_condition_auto_spain_low
description: ES listings under $550K with AI condition ≤3.1 and conclusion ≤3. Stricter threshold.
sellerMessage: This listing does not meet the visual quality standards for the Spanish market on JamesEdition.

name: gpt_condition_manual_italy
description: IT listings with borderline AI condition <2.5. Manual queue for human review.

name: gpt_condition_manual_spain
description: ES listings $500K-$2.1M with borderline AI scores. Manual queue.

name: gpt_conclusion_italy
description: IT listings flagged by AI conclusion score.

name: gpt_conclusion_spain
description: ES listings flagged by AI conclusion score.

name: gpt_watermark_sold_italy
description: IT listings where AI detects SOLD/Venduto watermark on images. Uses Sold_properties_gpt list.
sellerMessage: This listing appears to be sold. Please remove sold listings from your feed.

name: gpt_watermark_sold_spain
description: ES listings where AI detects SOLD/Vendido watermark. Uses Sold_properties_gpt list.
sellerMessage: This listing appears to be sold. Please remove sold listings from your feed.

name: gpt_watermark_sold_portugal
description: PT listings where AI detects SOLD watermark. Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: This listing appears to be sold. Please remove sold listings from your feed.

name: gpt_watermark_large_italy
description: IT listings with large watermarks detected by AI. Manual review.

name: gpt_unidentifiable_italy
description: IT listings where AI cannot identify the property. Price <$6M. Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing images do not clearly show the property. Please upload clear photos of the actual property.

name: gpt_unidentifiable_spain
description: ES listings where AI cannot identify the property. Price <$1.5M. Auto-reject.
sellerMessage: Your listing images do not clearly show the property. Please upload clear photos of the actual property.

name: gpt_unidentifiable_manual
description: High-value listings (≥$2M) where AI cannot identify property. Manual review.

name: cars_model_check
description: Car title matches carModels list (known non-luxury models). Freemium only.
sellerMessage: Your vehicle model does not appear to be in our luxury vehicle category. Please verify it qualifies for JamesEdition.

name: por_rentals_group
description: POR + rental type from specific groups. Reject.
sellerMessage: Price on Request rental listings are not accepted from this feed on JamesEdition.

name: netty_por_rentals
description: Group 1007 (Netty): POR + rental type. Reject.
sellerMessage: Price on Request rental listings are not accepted from this feed on JamesEdition.

name: por_justimmo
description: Group 3761 (Justimmo): POR + rental type. Reject.
sellerMessage: Price on Request rental listings are not accepted from this feed on JamesEdition.

name: viktor_approval
description: FeedLens force-approve flag is set.

name: viktor_autoreject
description: FeedLens force-reject flag is set.
sellerMessage: Your listing has been rejected by our moderation team. Please contact support for more information.

name: las_wrong_currency
description: LAS detected the listing price is in the wrong currency (e.g. MAD submitted as EUR, inflating price ~10×).
sellerMessage: We detected a potential currency mismatch on your listing. The price amount appears correct but the currency selected may be wrong. Please verify your price currency and resubmit.

name: las_absurd_price_scale
description: LAS detected an obvious scale error — extra zeros, cents entered as full units, or 100×/1000× magnitude mistake.
sellerMessage: Your listing price appears to have a significant scale error (e.g. extra zeros). Please verify the price and resubmit.

name: las_surface_unit_mismatch
description: LAS detected area was entered in wrong units (e.g. sqft submitted as sqm, inflating area ~10×).
sellerMessage: The living or land area appears to be in the wrong unit (e.g. square feet entered as square meters). Please verify your area measurements and resubmit.

name: las_implausible_area
description: LAS detected area is physically impossible for the stated property type.
sellerMessage: The stated area appears implausible for this property type. Please verify the living area and property type, then resubmit.

name: las_wrong_property_type
description: LAS detected the description clearly describes a different property type than the structured field.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to be categorized under the wrong property type. Please update the property type to match the actual property and resubmit.

name: las_living_area_lt_10
description: LAS SQL flag: living area between 0 and 10 sqm — sub-10 sqm properties do not exist in this segment.
sellerMessage: Your listing shows a living area under 10 sqm, which appears to be a data error. Please verify the living area and resubmit.

name: las_location_mismatch
description: LAS detected the description places the property in a different location than the listed address. Auto-rejects freemium when AI confidence > 0.8.
sellerMessage: The property location in your description does not match the listed address. Please verify the address and coordinates, then resubmit.

name: las_price_outlier_segment
description: LAS detected price-per-sqm is so far outside the segment it almost certainly indicates a data error. Auto-rejects freemium when AI confidence > 0.8.
sellerMessage: The price per square meter for your listing is extremely unusual for this market segment. Please verify your price and area measurements.

name: las_structured_data_incomplete
description: LAS detected the description explicitly states values that differ from or are missing in structured fields.
sellerMessage: We detected discrepancies between your listing description and the structured property data (e.g. bedroom count, area). Please update the listing fields to match your description.

name: las_location_cluster_generic
description: LAS detected the listing shares coordinates with many others and description has no specific building reference — likely a generic pin.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to use a generic location pin (e.g. city centre or office address). Please provide more precise coordinates for your property.

name: las_location_imprecise
description: LAS detected coordinates appear to be a placeholder (office address, city centre pin) — not cluster-related.
sellerMessage: The location data for your listing appears imprecise. Please provide a more specific address or coordinates.

name: las_stale_listing
description: LAS detected the listing appears outdated based on creation/update dates and description content.
sellerMessage: Your listing appears to be outdated. Please verify the listing is still active and update the description and photos if needed.

name: las_score_critical
description: LAS composite accuracy score below 0.4 — routes to manual queue for review regardless of individual flags.
sellerMessage: Your listing has been flagged for a data quality review. Our team will check the listing details shortly.
